description: Install @google/model-viewer, copy GLB/diorama/tile assets to desktop/public/, and create the 3D Habitat World component with all 6 boxes mapped to their GLB models
steps: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/LAUNCHPAD/desktop && npm install @google/model-viewer` to add the model-viewer web component as a dependency.
Copy GLB model files from project/models/ to desktop/public/models/ so Vite serves them: kitchen.glb, office.glb, cabin.glb, stanley_office.glb, night_sky.glb, forest.glb, cat_a.glb, cat_b.glb.
Copy diorama background images from project/dioramas/ to desktop/public/dioramas/: spielen.jpg, musik.jpg, geschichten.jpg, kreativ.jpg, entdecken.jpg, lernen.jpg.
Copy tile door images from project/tiles/ to desktop/public/tiles/: play.png, apps.png, library.png, create.png, watch.png, explore.png.

Create a new component at desktop/src/habitat/HabitatWorld.jsx that implements the 6-box 3D tile UI from the prototype. The component should: (a) import and register @google/model-viewer (side-effect import of the module), (b) define the MODELS mapping with all 6 boxes matching the prototype exactly: play->kitchen.glb (orbit: 180deg 74deg 68%), apps->office.glb (orbit: 190deg 72deg 65%), library->cabin.glb (orbit: 180deg 68deg 70%), create->stanley_office.glb (orbit: 190deg 72deg 60%), watch->night_sky.glb (orbit: 180deg 75deg 72%), explore->forest.glb (orbit: 185deg 70deg 72%), (c) define the DATA array with all 6 boxes: play (label: Play, tag: 8 Spiele bereit, accent: #6ea8ff, scene: dioramas/spielen.jpg), apps (label: Apps, tag: Alle Programme, accent: #57e0d8, scene: dioramas/musik.jpg), library (label: Library, tag: Buecher & Hoerspiele, accent: #c9a6ff, scene: dioramas/geschichten.jpg), create (label: Create, tag: Malen Musik & Code, accent: #5fe6b0, scene: dioramas/kreativ.jpg), watch (label: Watch, tag: Filme & Serien, accent: #7fb0ff, scene: dioramas/entdecken.jpg), explore (label: Explore, tag: Entdecke neue Orte, accent: #b79cff, scene: dioramas/lernen.jpg), (d) render a 3x2 grid of tile 'boxes' with door-open animation revealing the model-viewer interior, following the prototype's design: perspective-based 3D layout, door panels with tile images, interior with <model-viewer> showing the GLB when opened, (e) include an interior panel showing the box's title/icon/apps when open, (f) handle open/close with click + Escape key, (g) export as default and named export.

Create desktop/src/styles/habitat-world.css with styles for the 3D world component: .habitat-world (perspective container), .hw-box (individual tile box with 3D transform), .hw-door (the door panel with open animation), .hw-interior (revealed scene with model-viewer), atmosphere effects (particles, rays). Follow the prototype's visual design: dark space background with radial gradients, soft glow effects, 3D perspective at 1500px. Keep it performant for Electron.
Import the new habitat-world.css in desktop/src/main.jsx alongside the other style imports.

Add a new route/mode in desktop/src/App.jsx: add 'habitat' to the mode options. When mode === 'habitat', render <HabitatWorld />. Add a keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+H) to toggle habitat mode, similar to the existing Ctrl+G for controller mode. Import HabitatWorld from './habitat/HabitatWorld.jsx'.

Add a tile/button on the Desktop (Launchpad.jsx) home screen that navigates to the Habitat World view, so users can access it. Add a glass-style tile similar to the Windows-Desktop tile with an appropriate icon and label (e.g. 'Habitat' or '3D Welt').
acceptance_criteria: npm run build succeeds without errors after @google/model-viewer is installed
All 6 GLB models are accessible at /models/*.glb from the Vite dev server
All 6 diorama images are accessible at /dioramas/*.jpg from the Vite dev server
All 6 tile images are accessible at /tiles/*.png from the Vite dev server
HabitatWorld.jsx renders 6 boxes in a 3x2 grid with correct labels, tags, and accent colors
Each box's MODELS mapping matches the prototype: play->kitchen, apps->office, library->cabin, create->stanley_office, watch->night_sky, explore->forest
Clicking a box opens it, revealing a <model-viewer> element with the correct GLB src and camera-orbit
Pressing Escape or clicking a back button closes the open box
The component is accessible from App.jsx via mode switching (Ctrl+H or home tile click)
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/LAUNCHPAD/desktop && npm install && npm run build
Verify the built output references model-viewer and the GLB files: grep -r 'model-viewer' /projects/sandbox/LAUNCHPAD/desktop/src/habitat/HabitatWorld.jsx
Verify all 6 models are mapped: grep -c 'glb' /projects/sandbox/LAUNCHPAD/desktop/src/habitat/HabitatWorld.jsx should show at least 6 matches
findings: Pre-existing build errors in Parental.jsx (duplicate recoveryCode declaration) and WindowsDesktop.jsx (duplicate submitRecovery function) blocked the Vite build. Fixed both as part of this commit. All 85 tests pass. Build produces clean output with model-viewer bundled (1172KB main chunk includes model-viewer).
